description: CRITICAL: This is the DEFAULT tool for listing tags - use this instead of tags_get_all. NEVER make up or guess tag names. Use cases: (1) 'list my tags' or 'show all tags' - call WITHOUT tagName parameter to get all tag names. (2) 'check if tag X exists' - call WITH tagName parameter to verify a specific tag exists before creating or assigning contacts.

tagName.description: Optional: specific tag name to search for. If provided, returns whether this exact tag exists (case-insensitive match). Use this to verify a tag exists before creating or assigning contacts.

partnerClientCode.description: Optional partner client code to retrieve tags for a specific partner office/sub-client. Only use when explicitly requested.

exists.description: Whether the specified tag exists (only present when tagName parameter is provided)

tagName.description: The exact tag name as stored (only present when tagName parameter is provided and tag exists)

total.description: Total number of tags (when no tagName filter) or 1/0 (when tagName filter is used)

tagNames.description: Array of tag names (strings only). When tagName is provided, contains only the matching tag if found.
